name: Summon Instrument

heightened.text: The instrument is instead a virtuoso handheld instrument.

text: You materialize a handheld musical instrument in your grasp. The instrument is typical for its type, but it plays for only you. It vanishes when the spell ends. If you cast *summon instrument* again, any instrument you previously summoned disappears.
